infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IgnisStream needs camera access to capture your epic gaming moments
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: IgnisStream needs microphone access to record audio with your videos
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: IgnisStream needs photo library access to let you share your existing gaming screenshots and clips

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow IgnisStream to access your camera to capture epic gaming moments.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share your gaming screenshots and clips.
